data.body: Fixed in 06e59926 (+ the completion.py:91 E501 cleared earlier in d3ece706). All 28 ruff errors + 15 unformatted files resolved via ruff format + ruff check --fix + manual E402/E731/E501 fixes; lint/format-only, zero behavior change. Verified all gating checks green: ruff check src tests PASS; ruff format --check src tests PASS; mypy src/rebar/{reducer,graph,_store} PASS; pytest -m 'not integration and not external' = 2526 passed, 12 skipped. On AC#2 (version consistency): the floor is documented in pyproject ([dev] ruff>=0.6) and CI runs the same 'ruff check src tests' against the same resolved ruff as local, so they agree; the tree is validated clean against the current ruff (0.15.6).
